  • Method Details

    • onActionSaveCustomer

      public void onActionSaveCustomer(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException, SQLException
      This method allows users save inputting data. If a user leaves empty fields, an alert box will show.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -
      Throws:
      IOException
      SQLException

    • onActionCancelCustomer

      public void onActionCancelCustomer(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method allows users to click on the cancel button. If the user clicks cancel, all input will be deleted and user will return to main screen.. A confirmation box will appear for the user to confirm this is their intended action.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -
      Throws:
      IOException

    • emptyField

      public boolean emptyField()
      This will check the customer's information are filled and no empty fields are left.
      Returns:

      This will ensure there are no non-integer options in the division combo box.

    • onActionSelectCountry

      public void onActionSelectCountry(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      This will grab all the data from the countries and input it into the combo box.

      actionEvent -
